name: Loyiso Gola
blurb: He co-created and anchored the satirical news series Late Nite News with Loyiso Gola, and in 2021 became the first African comedian with a full-length original stand-up special on Netflix, Unlearning.
bio: Loyiso Gola is a South African stand-up and television comedian known for sharp political satire. He co-created and anchored the satirical news series Late Nite News with Loyiso Gola, and in 2021 became the first African comedian with a full-length original stand-up special on Netflix, Unlearning.

timeline.ev: Wins Sprite Soul Comedy Tour, relocates to Johannesburg
Wins Best Breakthrough Comedy Act for Loyiso Gola for President
Launches Late Nite News with Loyiso Gola
Late Nite News nominated for an International Emmy

accolades: Two-time International Emmy nominee (Late Nite News)
First African comedian with a full-hour Netflix original special
South African Comedy Award, Best Breakthrough Comedy Act (2007)
